transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I was craving some Bibimyeon (Cold Spicy Noodles) and steak tartare (raw beef) So I put them together
1kg of steak tartare and 8 packs of bibimmyeon
Whole Radish Kimchi here as well
Bon appetit
Looks yummy
It's a habit to blow on the noodles for mukbang
It's so good
Guys..
I knew that if I added 2 tasty dishes together, it will still be tasty
[Viewer: Give me a bite]
No way
It's not enough for me either
It's like thin noodles with meat
But even better
Egg yolk?

From the middle
Egg yolk
All over
I can't take too much at once
It's so good
Steak tartare
Dip in the egg
Get the noodles
Let's get some tartare
I wonder how this will taste
It's so delicious
I don't even need the radish kimchi
These cold spicy noodles are the best because it's Summer time
Let's mix them up
Why does it keep getting cut off?
Does anybody know why?

[Viewer: Bibimmyeon and Spam]
I've tried a lot of different food with these noodles
But the tartare has to be in the Top 3
Yummy
I need to save these
I cooked 8 packs, but it looks like we have more Did I put more?
Did I put 9?
It feels like it's lacking some sauce too
I bought 10 packs and opened them up
Did I accidentally put in 9?
It's possible
Right now is the hour when people crave late-night snacks the most
I always contemplate after midnight whether I should eat something or not
Egg yolk
Very nice
I feel a sneeze

I really wanted to sneeze It's been itchy
It's there, but it won't come out
I haven't had a good night sleep in a while
So I keep zoning out
On Friday, I was falling asleep while I was eating
As I was chewing
I dozed off
Really, just like this
My vision kept going out of focus
How do I say this? When you don't know where you are looking at
I need to save the tartare for the rest of the noodles
Egg yolk!
It exploded
Why do I keep blowing on it?
I did a great job saving them up
The steak tartare is so tasty

Yum
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
